name: steez-ui
description: Standalone React primitives, flat tokens, and shadcn-compatible registry output.

scripts.build: bun run build:packages && bun run build:registry
scripts.build:packages: bun run --filter '@steez-ui/theme' build && bun run --filter '@steez-ui/icons' build && bun run --filter '@steez-ui/ui' build
scripts.build:registry: bun run generate:registry && bun run generate:component-pages && bun run --filter '@steez-ui/registry' build
scripts.check:release: bun run build && bun run test && bun run test:install-smoke && bun run publish:packages:dry-run
scripts.deploy:registry: bun run build:registry && wrangler pages deploy apps/registry/dist --project-name steez-ui --branch main
